title: ChatCompletionRequest
description: JSON schema for the llama-cpp-python Chat Completion API (create_chat_completion) request parameters.

messages.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far.

role.description: The role of the message author.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the chat completion. Null means generate up to context window limit.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Higher values make the output more random.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling: the model considers tokens with top_p cumulative probability mass.

top_k.description: Limits token selection to the k most likely tokens at each step.

repeat_penalty.description: Penalizes repeated tokens. Values > 1 discourage repetition.

presence_penalty.description: Penalizes tokens based on whether they have appeared in the text so far.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalizes tokens based on their frequency in the text so far.

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

stream.description: If true, partial message deltas will be sent as server-sent events.

response_format.description: An object specifying the format the model must output.

schema.description: Optional JSON schema to constrain JSON output.

seed.description: If specified, the system will attempt to produce deterministic results.
